Name: GPU & CPU Temperature
Description: Show your CPU and GPU temperature live on your Ulanzi Deck. Two buttons — one for CPU, one for GPU. Click a key to switch between °C and °F. On Windows, run Ulanzi Studio as Administrator for full CPU sensor access.

Actions.Name: CPU Temperature
Actions.Tooltip: Show CPU temperature. Click to toggle °C / °F.

Actions.Name: GPU Temperature
Actions.Tooltip: Show GPU temperature. Click to toggle °C / °F.

Localization.unitHint: Tip: you can also click the key to toggle the unit.
Localization.pollIntervalHint: How often to update temperature readings.
Localization.privacyNote: Temperatures are read locally from your machine's thermal sensors. No network access.
Localization.windowsAdminNote: Windows: for full CPU sensor access, run Ulanzi Studio as Administrator (right-click → Run as administrator). Without it, the CPU key may show N/A.
